filesModified.purpose: Added .post-hero-inner rule with min-height: min(700px, 100vh), display: flex, flex-direction: column to enable bottom-aligned content layout
Replaced top padding push-down with mt-auto pt-[var(--header-height)] on content layer div
Synced same content layer class change from TSX: mt-auto pt-[var(--header-height)]

syncStatus.notes: Root wrapper mismatch warning is a known false positive — TSX uses <> fragment with InspectorControls + section, PHP uses section directly. No structural issue.

testPage.notes: No attribute or structural changes that affect test page content. Existing test page remains valid.

fixesApplied.change: Added .post-hero-inner { min-height: min(700px, 100vh); display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
Content layer div: replaced pt-[calc(var(--header-height)+180px)] sm:pt-[calc(var(--header-height)+280px)] with mt-auto pt-[var(--header-height)]
Content layer div: replaced pt-[calc(var(--header-height)+180px)] sm:pt-[calc(var(--header-height)+280px)] with mt-auto pt-[var(--header-height)]
